description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a slender build, depicted with a slightly exaggerated head and facial features. She is dressed in a buttoned, collared shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted pants, giving her a casual yet neat appearance suitable for an urban environment. Her arms are positioned behind her back, and her body leans backward, suggesting a relaxed or contemplative stance. The figure wears platform shoes, adding to her height and urban style. Her hair is long, parted to the side, and styled in two braids that fall over her shoulders. The overall look is modern and approachable, with a focus on clean lines and simple, everyday attire.
description: A stylized adult woman in casual urban clothing, standing with arms behind her back and leaning slightly backward. She has long braided hair and wears platform shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, braided hair, buttoned shirt, and arms held behind the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the backward lean, profile of the face, and the side of the platform shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, braids, and the full length of the arms behind the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the backward lean, side profile, and the right arm's position behind the back.
attribute_clothing_type: buttoned collared shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing with arms behind back and leaning backward
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in two braids
